card.title: cross-viewport UI reliability and layout hardening
card.summary: Unify phone, browser, and installed-app geometry so menu, play, Options, and Pause share measured safe content, status, overlay, motion, and fallback-background rules.
card.objective: Remove physical-device clipping, overlap, inconsistent sibling layouts, uncomfortable trail motion, fake scroll affordances, and purple safe-area bleed without introducing screenshot-specific offsets.
acceptanceCriteria: Menu and play use one contained two-row status layout beside Pause at phone widths.
Options and Pause share guide, control-row, scroll, and pinned-action geometry.
Page, app, Phaser, theme, and installed-app fallback backgrounds do not expose purple safe-area bands.
Trail shine moves at the reduced-motion 8000ms per-leg cadence.
Fresh physical iPhone Safari and installed-PWA proof confirms canonical production.
discoveries: The operator reported the prior 2600ms one-way trail shine was visually uncomfortable.
The production candidate now uses an 8000ms one-way / 16000ms round-trip cadence and versioned diagnostics.
nextActions: Collect fresh physical iPhone Safari and installed-PWA screenshots from canonical production.
Complete only if the phone review confirms no clipping, overlap, purple bleed, sibling drift, or uncomfortable motion.
blockers: Fresh operator physical-iPhone Safari and installed-PWA proof is still required.
evidence: Mazer PR #72 merged at 31d583ad5727fc5199a502530319cb1230188ef2 and PR #74 merged at 1395edb0cabeabd93fbf19cdcf3f0ed748bf642f.
The exact merged tree passed 49 files / 363 tests, type-check, build, and diff checks.
Production deployment dpl_9uzkHg9G9tRQUdcDSqa1NfEYiVUz is READY and aliased at https://fawxzzy-mazer.vercel.app.
Production 390x844 smoke loaded main-NJWVKtNV.js with no console errors, rgb(2, 8, 15) fallback backgrounds, trailPulsePeriodMs 8000, and trailShineCyclePeriodMs 16000.

entry.headline: Canonical production is ready for physical iPhone review
completed: Merged the UI and one-tile controls packets into current main.
Slowed the trail shine a little over three times and versioned the cadence contract.
Deployed and smoke-tested the exact merged tree on canonical production.
discovered: The former trail cadence was uncomfortable on the operator's physical display.
next: Collect fresh Safari and installed-PWA screenshots from the operator's iPhone.
Keep the card in Review until that evidence is clean.

card.title: shared menu and play run status panel
card.summary: Use one two-row status component in menu AI and active play for time, contextual rank, score out of 100, and maze level.
card.objective: Make menu and play progression information visually identical, readable, and contained while preserving the canonical score-data boundary.
acceptanceCriteria: Menu and play consume the same status-panel layout and formatting contract.
Time and contextual Rank, Score out of 100, and Maze Lvl remain readable at phone and desktop widths.
The play panel fits its measured lane beside Pause without overlap.
Displayed score remains traceable to the canonical run-quality contract.
discoveries: The shared panel is now merged and deployed on canonical production.
nextActions: Review the production panel on physical iPhone Safari and installed PWA.
Confirm final score-field authority before terminal completion.
blockers: Fresh physical iPhone proof and final canonical score-field traceability remain required.
evidence: Canonical production deployment dpl_9uzkHg9G9tRQUdcDSqa1NfEYiVUz is READY at https://fawxzzy-mazer.vercel.app.
The exact merged tree passed 49 files / 363 tests, type-check, build, and diff checks.
Production 390x844 smoke loaded the expected asset with no console errors.

entry.headline: Shared run status panel is live for physical-device review
completed: Deployed and smoke-tested the exact main tree on canonical production.
next: Confirm canonical score traceability before completion.
blockers: Physical-device acceptance and score authority remain open.
